Poker Hand #HD2222222222: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:31:00
Table 'Rush&Cash2' 6-Max Seat #5 is the button
Seat 1: Villain1 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain2 ($9.50 in chips)
Seat 3: Hero ($11.20 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain3 ($8.80 in chips)
Seat 5: Villain4 ($10.00 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($12.00 in chips)
Villain5: posts small blind $0.05
Villain1: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [2c 7d]
Hero: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain2: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain3: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain4: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain5: folds
Villain1: folds
Villain4 collected $0.15 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.15 | Rake $0.00
Seat 1: Villain1 (big blind) folded before Flop
Seat 2: Villain2 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
